rounds: The 6am necklace buy without deliberating — they didn't even get a word in. The painted toes on a Saturday — gone before they could object. Standing in the chemist comparing nail shades without flinching? That one stings them, because it was in public, in daylight, in front of strangers. Sleep got messy mid-week but you still hit nine activities and finished with Prince Alfred in the jockstrap emoji combo — they lost that one too.
pattern: They're loud before the moment, gone by the time you've already done it.
focus: Triniful Trial — wear the best-fitting piece for Matt.
